message:
feat(stdio): expand printf conformance with C fixture integration tests
and update support matrix for stdio ABI coverage

Add printf format-string conformance fixtures covering width, precision,
flag combinations, and edge-case format specifiers against host glibc
outputs. Extend stdio_abi.rs with hardened snprintf dispatch and
stdio_abi_test.rs with fixture-driven differential assertions. Update
support_matrix.json to reflect expanded stdio symbol coverage. Sync
beads issue tracker state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
   "version": 2,

   "library": "/data/tmp/cargo-target/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so",
-  "total_exported": 262,
+  "total_exported": 263,
   "taxonomy": {
     "Implemented": "Native Rust code owns the entire operation. No host libc dependency. Full test coverage required.",
     "RawSyscall": "ABI entrypoint marshals arguments directly to Linux syscall instruction. No glibc call-through.",

+      "symbol": "asprintf",
+      "status": "Implemented",
+      "module": "stdio_abi",

+      "default_stub": false
+    },
     {
       "symbol": "atan",
       "status": "Implemented",

+      "description": "Stdio phase-2 printf-family operations: snprintf/sprintf/fprintf/printf/dprintf/asprintf format/output contracts.",

       "covered_modules": ["stdio_abi"],
-      "tests": 5,
+      "tests": 6,
       "compile_flags": ["-O2", "-Wall", "-Wextra"],
       "link_flags": [],

         "posix": ["POSIX.1-2017 stdio formatted I/O contracts for snprintf/sprintf/fprintf/printf/dprintf and return-length semantics"],

         "c11": ["ISO C11 §7.21.6 formatted input/output function contracts in <stdio.h>"],
         "internal": ["FrankenLibC strict/hardened fixture parity contract for stdio phase-2 printf-family ABI behavior under LD_PRELOAD"]
       },
